sectiondef.header: Constans for the number of channels

description.para: Max and min pressure regulator pressure in psi

sectiondef.header: Channel constants shared with the ITC XOP.

description.para: Due to historic reasons these are now also used for other hardware types

sectiondef.header: DAQ Channel Type constants used in DAQConfigWave
When all DAQ Channels are set to TestPulse the output runs for TIME_TP_ONLY_ON_DAQ seconds

description.para: Convenience definition to nicify expressions like DimSize(wv, ROWS) easier to read than DimSize(wv, 0).
Convenience definition. easier to read than ModifyGraph userData(trace)={name, 0, value}

briefdescription.para: Wave entry is not NaN or "".
Wave entry is NaN or "".
Wave entry matches the bitmask given in var.
Wave entry does not match the bitmask given in var.

sectiondef.header: Parameters for GetPanelControl and IDX_GetSetsInRange, GetSetFolder, GetSetParamFolder and GetChanneListFromITCConfig
Controls for multiple channels have negative channel indizes
Constants for the bitmask entries stored in the selection wave

briefdescription.para: Convenience definition, equal to LISTBOX_CHECKBOX_SELECTED.

sectiondef.header: Constants for the note of the wave returned by GetTPStorage
Possible values for the function parameter of AI_SendToAmp

briefdescription.para: Can be combined, using bitwise or, with all integer types.

sectiondef.header: TabControl values in Browser Settings Panel
values for UserData in BrowserSettings and derived windows
Constants for the type flag of <tt>LoadData</tt>
Constants for the time alignment mode of TimeAlignmentIfReq

briefdescription.para: Or'ed with the testpulse mode. Special casing for testpulse during DAQ/RA/ITI.

sectiondef.header: Reserved Stim set name for TP while DAQ
Constants for Set/GetAxesRanges modes, use binary pattern
Constants for functions using rack number parameters

xrefdescription.para: extend these with PRE_SET_EVENT and POST_SET_EVENT once this is reworked, see https://github.com/AllenInstitute/MIES/issues/658 and https://github.com/AllenInstitute/MIES/issues/39.

description.para: The state values are serialized to the labnotebooks, so they must never change.

sectiondef.header: Special return values for analysis functions. See also @ref
Constants for differentiating between different analysis function versions

description.para: External trigger is used for yoking multiple ITC 1600 devices

detaileddescription.para: Version of the labnotebooks and results (numerical and textual) waves

Has to be increased on the following occasions:
New/Removed entries
Changed names of entries
Changed units or meaning of entries
New/Changed layers of entries

sectiondef.header: The channel numbers for the different ITC devices used for accesssing
Flags for all hardware interaction functions from MIES_DAC-Hardware.ipf
Minimum possible sampling intervals in milliseconds (1e-3s)

briefdescription.para: NI 6343 and other devices, so it is 4E-3 ms for 2 channels, 6E-3 ms for 3 a.s.o.
ITC DACs.
NI 6001 USB.

sectiondef.header: Constants for the return value of AI_SelectMultiClamp()

briefdescription.para: success
stored amplifier serials are invalid
calling MCC_SelectMultiClamp700B failed

sectiondef.header: Constants for the options parameter of DAP_ChangeHeadStageMode()

briefdescription.para: Default mode with all bells and whistles.
Does not move the headstage slider.

detaileddescription.para: Skips all unnecessary updates. Intereseting for temporarily switching the clamp mode, e.g. for an auto MCC amplifier function. Using that option requires to switch the clamp mode back to its original value.

description.para: See P_PressureMethodToString() for getting a string representation.

sectiondef.header: Different pressure types of each headstage

description.para: Numbers are stored in the SegWvType waves, so they are part of our "API".

briefdescription.para: Don't use for new code.

sectiondef.header: Ranges for different integer wave types
Ranges for NIDAQ analog output in volts

description.para: The longest key must be tested in CheckLength().

sectiondef.header: PatchSeq and MultiPatchSeq types of analysis functions

description.para: Constant values must not overlap between PSQ_XXX and MSQ_YYY.

sectiondef.header: Bounds action values, see also PSQ_CR_BoundsActionToString()

detaileddescription.para: Don't return a duplicate of the cached wave, but return the wave itself. Useful if you use the wave cache as an alternative storage.

sectiondef.header: Constants for the different delta operation modes in the Wavebuilder
Stimset wave note entry types for WB_GetWaveNoteEntry()
GUI settings oscilloscopy Y scale update modes
Return codes of the Igor exists function
Return codes of the Igor WinType function
Panel tag codes to identify panel types, set in creation macro as main window userdata($EXPCONFIG_UDATA_PANELTYPE)
Bit mask constants for properties for window control saving/restore
Correlated control name/type/valuetype list for use with e.g. ControlInfo

briefdescription.para: 0 does not apply, 1 V_Value, 2 S_Value, 3 S_DataFolder for EXPCONFIG_SAVE_ONLY_RELEVANT

sectiondef.header: PopupMenu extension keys for userdata definition of procedures
PopupMenu extension sub menu splitting methods
PopupMenu extension sub menu name generation methods

briefdescription.para: The only change: Some sweeps were added.
The only change: Some sweeps were removed.
The displayed data in the databrowser stayed constant but some settings changed.
Forces a complete update from scratch, use that if nothing else fits.

sectiondef.header: Work Load Class names used in ASYNC frame work
Header labels for draw groups within the json of a BufferedDrawInfo structure

description.para:
Currently this method is only used in
CreateTiledChannelGraph

briefdescription.para: Mode flags for PGC_SetAndActivateControl .
Maximum values of NUM_CHANNELS_CONSTANTS.
Amount of free memory required to perform data aquisition in GB.
The indizies correspond to the values from XopChannelConstants.
Common string to denote an invalid entry in a popupmenu.
Hook events constants.
Used by CheckName and UniqueName.
Generic axis name for graphs using split axis.

detaileddescription.para: Fallback value for the sampling interval in milliseconds (1e-3) used by SI_CalculateMinSampInterval if the lookup table could not be found on disk.

briefdescription.para: Last valid row index for storing epoch types in GetSegmentTypeWave.
Minimum logarithm to base two for the DAQDataWave size for ITC hardware.
Minimum value for the baseline fraction of the Testpulse in percent.

detaileddescription.para: Only used for internal bookkeeping. Never

briefdescription.para: send to analysis functions.

detaileddescription.para: Column for GetAnalysisFunctionStorage(). Same value as TOTAL_NUM_EVENTS but more readable.

memberdef.name: EVENT_NAME_LIST
memberdef.initializer: = "Pre DAQ;Mid Sweep;Post Sweep;Post Set;Post DAQ;Pre Sweep Config;Generic;Pre Set"

briefdescription.para: Human readable names for EVENT_TYPE_ANALYSIS_FUNCTIONS.

memberdef.name: EVENT_NAME_LIST_LBN
memberdef.initializer: = "Pre DAQ function;Mid Sweep function;Post Sweep function;Post Set function;Post DAQ function;Pre Sweep Config function;Generic function;Pre Set function"

briefdescription.para: Labnotebook entries.

detaileddescription.para: List of valid analysis function types

briefdescription.para: Number of layers in the labnotebook.
Index for storing headstage independent data into the labnotebook.
Number of common control groups in the DA_EPHYS panel.
Equals 2^5 from GetKeyState

detaileddescription.para: Conversion factor between volts and bits for the AD/DA channels The ITC 16 bit range is +-10.24 V such that a value of 32000 represents exactly 10 V, thus 3200 -> 1 V.

briefdescription.para: Used to upgrade the GuiStateWave as well as the DA Ephys panel.
Version of the stimset wave note.
Version of the epoch information for DA data.
List of different DAC hardware types.
We always use this DIO port for NI hardware.
Stimulus sets are created with that frequency.
Additional entry in the NWB source attribute for TTL data.
Number of trials to find a suitable port for binding a ZeroMQ service.
Convenience definition for functions interacting with threads.

detaileddescription.para: Used for the textual wavebuilder parameter wave WPT as that stores the set parameters in layer 0. Coincides with EPOCH_TYPE_SQUARE_PULSE.

briefdescription.para: DA_Ephys Panel Tabs.
DA_Ephys controls which should be disabled during DAQ.
DA_Ephys controls which should be disabled during DAQ and TP.
Maximum length of a valid object name in bytes in Igor Pro >= 8.
(Deprecated) Maximum length of a valid object name in bytes in Igor Pro < 8
Key prefix for runtime added labnotebooks by ED_AddEntryToLabnotebook()

detaileddescription.para: Parameters for GetLastSetting() for using the row caching mechanism.

briefdescription.para: Maximum number of microsecond timers in Igor Pro.

xrefdescription.para: : IP8 convert all call sites to use MultiThread/T=

detaileddescription.para: Exclusive list of functions which are allowed to call DQS_StartDAQSingleDevice()/DQM_StartDAQMultiDevice()

briefdescription.para: Maximum length of a sweep in the wavebuilder.
Especially interesting for PXP consumers like the analysis browser.
All experiment versions up to the given value are supported.
User data on the stimset controls listing all stimsets in range.
Wave note key for the indexing helper JSON document.
sprintf field width for trace names
Space used between numbers and their units.
which is sufficient to represent each sample point time with a distinctive number up to rates of 10 MHz.

detaileddescription.para: These characters are not allowed to be in epoch tags as they are used for serialization.

briefdescription.para: Global constants.
